text: tried to fix the kitchen faucet myself and now theres water coming from the ceiling fan somehow
my neighbor called the cops on me for mowing at 9am on a saturday. 9am. thats not even early
someone brought unseasoned quinoa to the office potluck again and acted like they did us a favor
open floor plans were invented by someone who never had a coworker who clips their nails at their desk
i have 14000 unread emails and at this point im just hoping nothing important is in there
found yogurt in the back of the fridge from 2024. it has evolved. i think it blinked at me
if you recline your seat on a 45 minute flight you are a war criminal
boss sent me a teams message at 11pm that just said 'hey'. still havent opened it
ordered decaf and they gave me regular. im vibrating. i can hear colors
coworker told me mercury is in retrograde thats why the printer jammed. the printer is from 2009 carol
put a shelf up with drywall anchors. shelf fell at 3am. sounded like a home invasion. dog still wont go in that room
the HOA sent me a letter about my trash can being visible from the street. its trash day. where else would it be
drove 6 hours for a scenic overlook and it was just fog. paid 5 dollars to park in fog
called customer support and got transferred 4 times then disconnected. been on hold for 2 hours total
texted my boss 'love you' instead of 'sounds good'. autocorrect has ruined my life
its 3am and im googling if fish get thirsty. this is who i am now
my succulent died. a succulent. the plant thats basically immortal. died under my care
netflix removed the one show i was watching mid season. what am i paying for exactly
tried to snake the drain and now theres a snake stuck in the drain plus the original clog
neighbor has a ring camera pointed directly at my front door. i wave every morning out of spite
got a flat tire in the middle of nowhere. spare was also flat. universe is testing me
chatbot told me my flight was on time. flight was cancelled 3 hours ago
sent 'im not coming' to my dentist but autocorrect changed it to 'im not crying' and they called to check on me
do ants sleep. like do they have tiny dreams. why am i like this at 4am
overwatered my fern. underwatered my cactus. i have the range to kill any plant apparently
my roommate watches shows on 2x speed and says he 'gets the gist'. monster behavior
painted the bathroom and now the door wont close. nobody warned me about paint thickness
the neighborhood facebook group is fighting about a cat again. its been 3 days. 200 comments
rest stop bathroom on I-95 changed me as a person. i will never be the same
was on hold so long i forgot who i called. when they answered i panicked and hung up
tried to text 'on my way' and sent 'on my wayyy' to my landlord. now he thinks im fun
if the moon controls the tides does it also control my emotions asking for a friend
bought a 'low maintenance' plant. it needs indirect sunlight, filtered water, and classical music apparently
cancelled one streaming service. signed up for another. its a lateral move at best
caulked the bathtub. looks like a toddler did it. water still leaks. hiring a professional
someone on my block has been running a leaf blower for 45 minutes. theres like 6 leaves
GPS said 'make a legal u-turn' in the middle of a highway. GPS is trying to end me
spent 20 min explaining my issue to support then they said 'have you tried turning it off and on'
meant to google 'best restaurants near me' and searched it in the work slack channel
3am thought: what if elevators are just vertical buses
my herb garden is just expensive dirt at this point. basil lasted 4 days
paying for 4 streaming services and still cant find anything to watch. might just read a book. jk no i wont
tried to install a ceiling fan. now theres a hole in the ceiling and no fan. improvement
the neighborhood watch guy knocked on my door at 7am to tell me my porch light was out. thanks gary
forgot snacks on a 5 hour drive. almost pulled over for gas station sushi. dark times
automated phone tree made me say my account number out loud on a crowded bus
autocorrect changed 'regards' to 'regrets' in my work email. honestly more accurate
why do we park in driveways and drive on parkways. 2am me needs answers
my aloe vera plant is sunburned. the irony is not lost on me
friend spoiled the show i was watching because 'its been out for 2 days'. two days is not enough time jessica
light switch in my house controls an outlet in a different room. previous owner was chaotic evil
someone stole my amazon package. it was cat litter. enjoy your 20 pounds of cat litter you animal
took a wrong turn and ended up in a different state. wasnt even a long wrong turn just one exit
called to cancel my subscription. they offered me a discount. called back to cancel that too
emailed my professor 'thanks mom' and im transferring schools
does the light in the fridge stay on when you close the door. ive been up since 2am thinking about it
my monstera has one leaf and an attitude. still talking to it daily like a therapist
show i liked got cancelled after 1 season but theres 47 seasons of whatever cooking competition
toilet started running at midnight. watched 3 youtube videos. made it worse. plumber comes tuesday
lady in the neighborhood group posted about a 'suspicious man' walking. it was the mailman. on his route
drove 2 hours to a restaurant i saw on tiktok. it was closed on tuesdays. it was tuesday
customer service said 'your call is important to us' 47 times. if it was important youd answer it
tried to type 'ill be there in a sec' and sent 'ill be there in a sex'. to my mother in law
what if we're all just NPCs in someone elses game and the lag is why i stub my toe so much
bought a fiddle leaf fig knowing full well i cant keep anything alive. call it optimism
everyone in this house wants to watch something different. we have 5 screens and still argue
replaced a light fixture and blew a fuse. electrician said i created a 'creative wiring solution'
HOA fined me for having the wrong shade of beige on my mailbox. there are wrong shades of beige
rental car smelled like someone lived in it. found a sock under the seat. not mine. whose sock
been on hold so long the hold music is stuck in my head. humming it at dinner now
siri called my ex when i said 'call mom'. siri knows what she did
3:47am wondering if dogs know theyre dogs or if they think theyre just short people
watered my air plant. apparently you can overwater an air plant. its in the name. its air
my password for one streaming service is literally 'cancelthis1' and i still havent cancelled
hung a picture frame. used a level and everything. its still crooked. house might be crooked
someone on nextdoor is offering 'gently used mattress, only slept on twice'. sure jan
missed my exit because i was singing and drove an extra 40 minutes. worth it honestly
support agent asked me to describe my issue 'in a few words'. buddy i have a novel prepared
autocorrect turned 'meeting at noon' into 'meting at moon'. nobody questioned it
if you think about it a burrito is just a sleeping bag for food. 4am brain is undefeated
my spider plant had babies and now i have 9 spider plants. didnt consent to this
the 'are you still watching' popup is the most passive aggressive thing technology has ever done
garbage disposal sounds like its eating silverware. checked. it was eating silverware
neighbor pressure washed his driveway at 6am on a sunday. we are not friends anymore
rest stop vending machine ate my dollar and gave me pretzels instead of chips. chaos reigns
live chat support told me to call. phone support told me to use live chat. im in purgatory
texted 'happy birthday' to someone. it wasnt their birthday. now we both pretend it didnt happen
at 2am all my life choices feel questionable. by 7am im fine. the night lies to you
my peace lily is not peaceful. it droops if i look at it wrong. drama queen of plants
free trial required a credit card. forgot to cancel. been paying for 8 months for a service i used once
fixed a squeaky door hinge. now a different door squeaks. the house is haunted probably
neighborhood watch meeting lasted 2 hours. conclusion: we should 'keep an eye out'. groundbreaking
google maps took me through a road that technically exists but emotionally should not
store return policy said 30 days. its day 31. they looked at me like i committed a crime
voice to text interpreted my sneeze as 'call 911'. had to explain to dispatch that i have allergies
who decided we sleep at night. what if mornings are the real enemy
adopted a rescue plant from the clearance rack. its thriving. apparently plants respond to low expectations
roommate fell asleep during the season finale and i cant talk about it with anyone. suffering
dryer vent was clogged. cleaned it out. found enough lint to build a second dryer
porch pirate stole my package of dog poop bags. poetic justice is real and its beautiful
